subcodes.first_line: A sincere lover is not seized by heedlessness, nor is a true admirer deprived of that which causeth the manifestation of the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محب صادق را غفلت اخذ ننماید و عاشق موافق از آنچه سبب ظهور امرست محروم
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @light and darkness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @predictions and prophecies, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
